response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C++ work at National Instruments and a strong background in high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps in Dlang). However, his recent roles have focused heavily on web/mobile stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and not C++/STL for industrial automation. His lack of explicit mention of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) raises concerns. The career gap and recent shift away from C++ may impact role readiness.
strengths: Strong C++ experience at National Instruments, including core development and legacy systems
Proven track record in high-performance, low-latency applications (e.g., real-time metadata handling)
Diverse technical expertise (embedded, web, mobile) with a focus on test-driven development and clean architecture
concerns: Limited recent C++/STL experience (last significant C++ role was 2015, with no mention of STL or modern C++ practices)
No clear evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or cloud platform experience (e.g., Azure, MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP)
Lacks explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
